      simp [SigmakP]

      have h₅ : ∀ a, L a ↔ ∃ b, (eb.encode b).length ≤ Polynomial.eval (ea.encode a).length p ∧ L' (a, b) := by

  have h_main : ∀ (α : Type) [Primcodable α] (ea : FinEncoding α) (L : Language α), SigmakP k ea L ↔ InP ea L := by

        simp_all [SigmakP]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
      <;>
      aesop
  exact h₁ k α _ ea L
